name: Venly
description: Web3 platform for developers with digital wallet APIs, NFT minting tooling and payment APIs across EVM, Solana, Polygon and more.

seo.title: Venly — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Venly: Web3 platform for developers with digital wallet APIs, NFT minting tooling and payment APIs across EVM, Solana, Polygon and more.

when_to_use: Web3 wallet API for multi-chain NFT and token management
Non-custodial wallet SDK for dApps without private key handling
NFT minting across EVM, Solana, and Polygon via one API
Payment APIs for in-game asset purchases in Web3 games
Simplified blockchain integration for Web2 companies going Web3

pros: Unified wallet API across EVM, Solana, Polygon
NFT minting and fiat on-ramp tooling
Custodial option lowers UX friction for users
cons: Custodial wallets concentrate trust in Venly
Pricing steps up quickly past free tier
Less loved by crypto-native self-custody users
Web3 market volatility affects roadmap stability
review.verdict: Pragmatic Web3 backend that trades decentralization for UX — great for mainstream dapps, wrong for crypto purists.
review.best_for: Game studios and brands launching NFT/wallet features for non-crypto users
review.not_for: Self-custody-first projects or DeFi protocols that reject custodial infra
